data.title: Bitcoin Whales Quietly Stack 16,000 BTC During Downtrend
data.description:
Reports from CryptoQuant suggest that large holders are moving aggressively while smaller players are bailing out. Related Reading: Bitcoin’s Next Stop For 2025? $175,000, According To SOL Strategies Boss Over the past week, wallets linked to key Bitcoin participants grabbed more than 16,000 BTC during a price decline. At the same time, retail investors have been selling into weakness, taking losses and widening the gap between whales and small traders. Analysts see this as a possible clue that the market could be forming a local bottom
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-whales-quietly-stack-16000-btc-during-downtrend/

data.title: SharpLink board authorizes $1.5 billion stock repurchase against Ethereum
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming, Inc. , one of the largest corporate holders of Ether and a renowned industry ETH evangelist, has announced that its Board of Directors has authorized a stock repurchase program of up to $1. 5 billion of the company’s common stock. According to Sharplink, buybacks will be more value-accretive when the share price trades below its […]

data.title: A Wake-Up Call for the UK: Why It’s Falling Behind in the Global Bitcoin Race
data.description:
While the UK government has expressed a desire to be a global hub for digital assets, reality tells a different story. The British crypto community is sounding the alarm, arguing that the country is falling behind in the global Bitcoin race. Experts from crypto organizations across the UK told BeInCrypto that the country’s cautious approach stifles innovation and drives businesses offshore. This continued environment will evaporate any competitive advantage the UK used to have in financial innovation
source: https://beincrypto.com/uk-falling-behind-global-bitcoin-race/

data.title: Hollywood Embraces Blockchain: Ron Perlman Launches Decentralized Film and TV  Platform
data.description:
Hollywood, the world’s oldest national film industry worth billions, faces new challenges as film makers struggle to remain in control of their data, IP rights and financial earnings. At the same time, moviegoers that once visited theatres to watch films have begun streaming movies at home. The issues facing the film industry have resulted in declining […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hollywood-embraces-blockchain-ron-perlman-launches-decentralized-film-and-tv-platform/

data.title: MicroStrategy (MSTR) Stock May Soon Make A Big S&P 500 Debut, All Criteria Met
data.description:
Key Insights: MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock may soon be included in the S&P 500 after meeting all the set criteria. The update came on August 21, 2025, with indications that the company led by Michael Saylor had satisfied every requirement.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/22/microstrategy-mstr-stock-may-soon-make-a-big-sp-500-debut-all-criteria-met/

data.title: Deutsche Bank Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in September and December
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Deutsche Bank has revised its forecast for the Federal Reserve's interest rate policy. The bank now anticipates that the Federal Reserve will implement a 25 basis point rate cut in both September and December. This marks a change from their earlier prediction, which expected a rate cut only in December 2025.

data.title: Shiba Inu Developer Unveils New LEASH v2 Migration Strategy
data.description:
In Brief After a series of updates from the core team, Shiba Inu’s lead developer has unveiled a migration plan designed to restore fairness for LEASH holders. The strategy combines a ratio-based conversion with targeted snapshots, aiming to protect long-term investors and chart a path out of the rebase controversy. In his latest blog post published Friday, lead developer Kaal Dhairya addressed the challenges posed by LEASH v1’s unexpected rebases, which continue to affect the token’s supply. “Rebases on LEASH v1 are still being triggered, but our job is to protect holders and deliver a smooth, verifiable migration to LEASH The post Shiba Inu Developer Unveils New LEASH v2 Migration Strategy first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/22/shiba-inu-developer-unveils-new-leash-v2-migration-strategy/

data.title: Fed’s Dilemma Supports Gold: Top Mining Stocks to Watch
data.description:
Neither the author, Tim Fries, nor this website, The Tokenist, provide financial advice. Please consult our website policy prior to making financial decisions. After Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell’s speech at the Jackson Hole Economic Policy Symposium, Fed fund futures show an 81% probability for a 25 bps interest rate cut in September. Since December 2022, the fed funds rate has remained above 4% to curb inflation
source: https://tokenist.com/feds-dilemma-supports-gold-top-mining-stocks-to-watch/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=feds-dilemma-supports-gold-top-mining-stocks-to-watch

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 4,700 USDT with a 11.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 22, 2025, 16:08 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 4,700 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 4,723.689941 USDT, with a narrowed 11.19% increase in 24 hours.
